title: TradeMine Item Random
body:
# TradeMine Item Random

-MOD MADE WITH MCREATOR

-MOD under MIT LICENSE

**This project has been stopped updating permanently for feature, but if there is a reported bug, I may fix it. Project now just receive bug-fix update**

## Recipe

https://ibb.co/album/RhXRVb

## Block

**Ore Of Randomness**

Ore of Randomness will drop random item like : Diamond, Iron, Gold, Coal,... and it always drop Coal

![Ore Of Randomness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/7fc4e59251885fe2ab11bf46eebbe5610a54ab89.png)

![Deepslate Ore Of Randomness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/ba5a50b80a44be6c7b2fdff3c7df40e9e6478fbd.png)

![Nether Ore Of Randomness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/cad2707409aa21923e46005a9e45c8caf15ed184.png)

**Random Trader** : Trade for random Potion, Enchantments, Spawn Eggs

![Random Trader GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7714aece9896904cbdcbca67c022111a88c6305e.png)

**Random Spawner** : Like A spawner but spawn random hostile

**Flower Of Randomness**: Generate Naturally or can be got by bonemeal on grass (chance 40%).

## Item

**Potion Of Random**: Give player random effect

**Potion/Splash Potion/Lingering Potion/Arrow of Infested Mob and Infested Item**: Give Player effect Infested Mob or Infested Item

![Allay (is drowning) was effected with Infested Item and Infested Mob potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/791f7964bdcfdace68202e236420f03c47053298.png)

**Rainbow Dye**: Use for crafting, composting, burning, craft from Flower of Randomness

**Any Food/Any Minerals/Any Armor Trims** : Give player random food/ minerals/armor trims (Trade With Villagers. See in Gallery)

![Any Food/ Armor Trims/ Minerals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/72f7097362aae02fb95dc98ab1f4c95ed3f2bf7a.png)

**Summoner Armor Helmet**

-When entity dies, one random hostile in Minecraft will spawn (Just apply when the world is day)

-When this entity is struct by lightning, entity will despawn and random spawn one of three boss (Elder Guardian, Wither, Warden)

![A zombie wear SUMMONER ARMOR HELMET](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/473000cdcfafefd91bd5f05b3bbab9c4a6487cb1.png)

## Crop

**Random Crop**

Random Crop drops Random Food and has 5 stages

Drop Chance: (Loot Table)

| Chance (%) |Item |
|-----------|----------------|
| **50%** | Apple, Bread, Cooked Beef, Cooked Porkchop, Cooked Chicken, Cooked Mutton, Cooked Rabbit, Cooked Cod, Cooked Salmon, Carrot, Potato, Baked Potato, Beetroot, Beetroot Soup, Wheat, Beef, Porkchop, Chicken, Mutton, Rabbit, Cod, Salmon, Cookie, Pumpkin Pie, Honey Bottle, Sweet Berries, Glow Berries |
| **18%** | Golden Carrot, Cake, Chorus Fruit, Golden Apple, Enchanted Golden Apple, Rotten Flesh, Spider Eye, Pufferfish, Tropical Fish, Suspicious Stew, Rabbit Stew |

![Random Crop First Stage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/804914ab289e2a303d9421bb49089f650b430a03.png)

![Random Crop Last Stage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/4c88875fb0c64957c33bf3745d15861189612758.png)

## Effect

**Infested Item** : When Mob/Player hurts, random item will drop with the same chance

**Infested Mob** : Random Mob  will spawn when Mob/Player hurts

## Enchantments

**Random Taken** (For Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite Swords) : Drop random item when entity dies

**Disaster** (For Bow and Crossbow) : Give bad effect for entity or make entity stuck in cobweb or make entity be on fire.

## Structure

**Random Spawner Dungeon** : Like A Dungeon but has Random Spawner

![Random Spanwner Dungeon (Random Spawner Room)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/94c90a539417a061d8ebf76ac84cdb5e3252bbff.png)

![Random Spanwner Dungeon (Random Spawner Room)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/e58e34bfec25abda78ba4ccf3d7c3cceb1e4b927.png)

![Random Spanwner Dungeon (Random Spawner Room)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LZCtJS3i/images/3602445c5be68407bc103b77af0a289ac7a64d5b.png)

## Advancedment

|Advancedment        |Way to get              |
|------------------- |------------------------|
|Make Anything Random|Get Rainbow Dye         |
|Trader Machine      |Trade with Random Trader|
